modelVersion.description: Version date for the static preview content model.

id.description: Stable content id for the FAQ entry.

audiences.description: Audience landing views that surface this FAQ entry. Closed set. An entry with no audiences tag is treated as recruiting-visible by default.

claimStatus.description: Claim status from the RITE research package's claim_status_legend. needs_confirmation material must not be published.

sourceNote.description: Optional human-readable note on where this answer's facts came from.

lastVerified.description: ISO date this answer was last verified against source material.

productionMapping.note: Static preview content only. In the future .NET API / SQLite model, each FAQ entry maps to a reviewed FaqEntry entity with a many-to-many relation to an Audience lookup table carrying the same alumni/active/recruiting values. claimStatus, sourceNote, and lastVerified map to fields on that entity's verification record.
